content:
# P Wave Reflection

**Summary**: The primary seismic wave reflecting off subsurface layers.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-jahlan|Jahlan, 2024]] evaluated the continuity and clarity of the P-wave reflection event under sand dune conditions.

## Scientific Context

- [[2024-jahlan|Jahlan, 2024]] The primary target of imaging in the study, which was obscured by sand dune noise.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2024-jahlan|Jahlan, 2024]] Visual and comparative analysis of stack sections.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The parallax-based approaches improved the quality of the stack section by illuminating the P-wave reflection event under the sand dune. ([[2024-jahlan|Jahlan, 2024, p. 83]])
